title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) is a Life OS built on Claude Code that provides persistent memory, custom skills, structured workflows, and a seven-phase Algorithm to retain project context across AI sessions. It addresses the problem of AI agents forgetting architecture, coding standards, and prior decisions between sessions.
writeup: The video covers PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on Claude Code that gives AI-powered development persistent memory, custom skills, structured workflows, and a seven-phase Algorithm. It targets a common failure mode: AI agents forgetting architecture, coding standards, and prior decisions between sessions. The core takeaway is that PAI retains project context across sessions, so an agentic system can carry architecture and earlier decisions forward rather than starting cold each time.
